name: Dr. Rahul Mishra
about: Dr. Rahul Mishra is an Assistant Professor in the Department of Computer Science & Engineering at the Indian Institute of Technology Patna. His research interests lie at the intersection of Deep Learning, Fog Computing, Internet of Things (IoT), and Smart Sensing.
awards: Got student conference grant sponsored by the IEEE Communications Society (ComSoc), INFOCOM 2021 and 2022

books.title: AICTE Textbook on Design and Analysis of Algorithm (Link)

patents.title: Rahul Mishra, T. K. Maiti, A. Jain, P. Lalwani, and R. Shah, "Racket Sports Activities Monitoring and Corrections using Grip Embedded Sensors and Smartphone",  Patent filed (Patent no. 202411014828)
